001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.CandlingObservation;
005import java.util.List;
006import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
007
008/**
009 * Abstraction for accessing and modifying {@link CandlingObservation} entities.
010 */
011public interface CandlingObservationRepository {
012
013  /**
014   * Returns all candling observations recorded for a given egg.
015   *
016   * @param eggId egg ID.
017   * @return live list of observations for the specified egg.
018   */
019  LiveData<List<CandlingObservation>> getByEgg(long eggId);
020
021  /**
022   * Returns a single candling observation by ID.
023   *
024   * @param id observation ID.
025   * @return live observation with the specified ID.
026   */
027  LiveData<CandlingObservation> get(long id);
028
029  /**
030   * Inserts or updates a candling observation.
031   *
032   * @param observation observation to save.
033   * @return future completing with the saved observation ID.
034   */
035  CompletableFuture<Long> save(CandlingObservation observation);
036}
